subcodes.first_line: We have indeed sent down the verses and manifested the clear proofs, and We have informed all of that which was hidden from them, yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انزلنا الایات و اظهرنا البینات و اخبرنا الکل ما کان مستورا عنهم ولکن
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @suffering and imprisonment
